data.description: This is a description of the Circle of Teleportation spell.
This light is faint and barely illuminates its surroundings.
These sharp spines or bristles can be embedded in a plant to cause damage.
Make melee attack against target. The spell targets a creature within 5 ft. If the target is hit, the target takes 1d6 piercing damage and is pulled up to 10 feet closer to you.
